tluaMetatableDebug.tlua(13,23): error TLUA2339: Property 'a' does not exist on type '{ n: number; b: string; }'.
tluaMetatableDebug.tlua(18,21): error TLUA2339: Property 'c' does not exist on type 'table'.
tluaMetatableDebug.tlua(26,25): error TLUA2339: Property 'base' does not exist on type '{ y: number; swapped: string; }'.


==== tluaMetatableDebug.tlua (3 errors) ====
    // The debug library bypasses __metatable protection. debug.getmetatable returns the real
    // metatable, and debug.setmetatable replaces it, both regardless of protection.
    
    local guarded = setmetatable({ n = 1 }, { __index = { a = 1 }, __metatable = "locked" });
    
    // debug.getmetatable sees the real metatable, not the sentinel.
    local real = debug.getmetatable(guarded);
    local ra: number = real.__index.a;
    
    // debug.setmetatable replaces a protected pairing without error.
    local swapped = debug.setmetatable(guarded, { __index = { b = "s" } });
    local sb: string = swapped.b;
    local goneA = swapped.a;
                          ~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'a' does not exist on type '{ n: number; b: string; }'.
    
    // A member call through anything but the debug global is not the protocol.
    local fake = { setmetatable = function(v: table, mt: table): table return v; end };
    local aliased = fake.setmetatable(guarded, { __index = { c = 1 } });
    local noC = aliased.c;
                        ~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'c' does not exist on type 'table'.
    
    // The statement form bypasses protection too: debug.setmetatable narrows past a protected
    // antecedent where the global setmetatable would refuse.
    function stmtBypass(): void
      local prot = setmetatable({ y = 1 }, { __index = { base = 1 }, __metatable = "locked" });
      debug.setmetatable(prot, { __index = { swapped = "s" } });
      local s: string = prot.swapped;
      local goneBase = prot.base;
                            ~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'base' does not exist on type '{ y: number; swapped: string; }'.
    end
